nasb.text: Say, ‘I am a sign to you. As I have done, so it will be done to them; they will go into exile, into captivity.’

esv.text: Say, ‘I am a sign for you: as I have done, so shall it be done to them. They shall go into exile, into captivity.’

cnv.text: 你要說：‘我作你們的一個兆頭，我怎樣行，他們的遭遇也必怎樣；他們必被擄去。’

ccb.text: 你要说，‘我就是给你们的预兆，我所做的必发生在你们身上，你们必被掳流亡。’
